entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation assignedRoles Test Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="IIQ" nativeIdentity="CN=Adam Kennedy,OU=Engineering,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Add" value="Adam Kennedy@eshiam.com"/> <AttributeRequest name="password" op="Add" value="Admin@123"/> <AttributeRequest name="assignedRoles" op="Add" value="ad_business_role"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan>
